templates.label: Owner-Correct Fix
templates.description: Build a bounded Codex task that audits first and fixes only the root owner.
templates.template: Audit {scope} first. Identify the real owner chain, preserve modularity, remove duplicate ownership, and implement {objective} from the owner source only. Verify with {verification}.

templates.label: Feature Foundation
templates.description: Create modular feature scaffolding without pretending backend completeness.
templates.template: Create a modular, data-driven foundation for {scope}. Use sovereign HTML, CSS, JS, and JSON owners. Use existing global tokens. If backend capability is unavailable, expose a graceful pending state and document the blocker.

templates.label: Production Readiness Review
templates.description: Inspect a surface for operational readiness and implementation drift.
templates.template: Review {scope} for production readiness. Prioritize broken behavior, duplicate ownership, missing data binding, token drift, and unverified backend assumptions. Return findings with exact files and verification gaps.
